title: First 24 Hours After a Death Checklist
summary: The genuinely short list of what needs to happen right away — everything else can wait.

tasks.title: Confirm the death is handled by the right authority
tasks.explanation: Hospice, doctor, or medical examiner, depending on circumstances.
tasks.notes: See "When to Call Hospice, the Doctor, or 911 After a Death."

tasks.title: Contact a funeral home
tasks.explanation: They'll arrange transport and schedule a longer planning meeting later.

tasks.title: Notify 2–3 of the closest family members personally
tasks.explanation: Let them help spread the word further.

tasks.title: Ask the funeral home how they handle the death certificate filing
tasks.explanation: No need to act on this yet, just understand the process.

tasks.title: Identify who will coordinate next steps
tasks.explanation: — doesn't need to be decided today, but worth naming.

tasks.title: Take care of yourself first
tasks.explanation: Rest, food, and support matter more than any task on this list today.
